{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Lesser Karoshan system
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Lesser Karoshan system]] is located next to the primary [[Karoshan]] system.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c1">''The Knight'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Lesser Karoshan system]] is a location where the [[Iron Legion]] was cleared.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
